# Günther Anders

*1902 – 1992 · German*

German philosopher of the atomic age: our capacity to produce now outstrips our capacity to imagine what we produce, a "Promethean gap" that leaves humanity all but outdated beside its own works.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
